examples: The couple married in 1904 when Gerda was 17 and Einar was 22.
Einar Wegener (born in Denmark) was a leading artist in late 1920's Paris.
Eric ordered the Finn to silence Einar and bring him toppling down from his lofty perch.
Its Ole Einar Bjoerndalen , the Carl Lewis of snow, won four biathalon gold medals alone.
Einar Ronander and his colleagues were once employed by South Africa's Atomic Energy Corporation.
